name: agent-orch
description: Stage-first Codex orchestration with durable CC, AGY, and Codex Worker execution, independent review, acceptance, and continuation.

interface.shortDescription: Stage-first orchestration with CC, AGY, and Codex Worker.
interface.longDescription: A stage-first MCP workflow that keeps Codex responsible for planning and formal acceptance while CC, AGY, or Codex Worker implements in isolated worktrees, AGY provides independent review, and durable PID/session state supports continuation across MCP restarts.
defaultPrompt: Use agent-orch stage-plan, stage-work, stage-review, and stage-accept for this change.
Use agent-orch to continue the exact provider session and worktree for this task.
Use agent-orch to verify provider availability and durable worker state.
